markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and refine the product input process.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Content drafts are inaccurate (e.g., "incident response remediation"), requiring heavy PMM edits. This stems from GrowthX's foundational artifacts lacking sufficient product detail.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [**Solution:** PMMs will provide detailed product input by EOW. GrowthX will use this to update the `Company Context` doc and create a new, deep-dive `Product Artifact` for AI generation.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [**Process:** The immediate priority is fixing the input artifacts. PMMs will review blog topics in the `Content OS` (Airtable) starting next week.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=2510.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Inaccurate Content Drafts

  - [The "incident response automation" draft was flagged as inaccurate because N-able's offering is an "AI SOC agent," not a remediation tool.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [This inaccuracy stems from the foundational artifacts (`Company Context`, `Audience Personas`) used for AI generation being too shallow on product details.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [**Goal:** Shift from paid search to organic traffic by publishing educational, SEO-optimized content. This content must be factually correct to build trust and drive results.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

### The Solution: A Two-Part Input Process

  - [PMMs will provide two types of input to fix the accuracy issue:](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
    1.  [**Update `Company Context` Doc:** Add a high-level (approx. 0.5 page) overview for each product.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
    2.  [**Share Deep-Dive Docs:** Provide internal materials (e.g., "get to know our products" folder, "resiliency" docs) for a new, dedicated `Product Artifact`.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This two-part approach keeps the `Company Context` document concise while providing the AI with the deep, accurate product knowledge needed for generation and fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)

### The Tool: Content OS (Airtable)

  - [The `Content OS` is the central hub for managing blog topic ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Purpose:** PMMs will use it to approve topics, provide strategic angles, and prioritize ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=2305.0)
  - [**Key Fields:**](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
      - [`N-able Feedback`: For PMM comments (permissions will be updated for public visibility).](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [`Target Keyword`: The term the post is optimized for.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=2206.0)
      - [`Volume`: Search volume, indicating traffic potential (high volume = broad top-of-funnel, low volume = specific ICP).](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
  - [**Process:** PMMs will review topics starting next week, after the input artifacts are updated.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=2510.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=2453.0)
      - [Send follow-up email with links to Notion artifacts and the `Content OS`.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1903.0)
      - [Update `Content OS` permissions for public PMM comments.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [Create the new `Product Artifact` upon receiving PMM input.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [**PMM Team (Joe, Jen, Garrett, Stuti):**](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [**By EOW:** Update the `Company Context` Notion doc and upload deep-dive product docs.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
      - [**Next Week:** Review and provide feedback on blog topics in the `Content OS`.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=2510.0)
  - [**Nick / Andrew (N-able):**](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
      - [Project manage internal PMM coordination and deadlines.](https://fathom.video/share/djxUDKFwgzxj9ayqCBPB6yKFYK9EpUNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
